# CURRICULUM
# Generated by: [Account name / session date]
# Course: [ACTIVE COURSE]
# Lab: [ACTIVE LAB]
# Total projects planned: [N]
# Last updated: [DATE]
#
# STATUS KEY:
# [ ] = not started
# [x] = completed (verify against database)
# [-] = in progress
#
# DO NOT manually mark status here.
# Status is tracked in brain.db.
# Run: python3 curriculum_status.py to see live status.

# Prerequisites: [what student must know before phase 1]

  Lab      : [lab name]
  Course   : [course name]
  Phase    : 1
  Gap      : [what gap this closes]
  Builds on: [what must be known first]
  Unlocks  : [what becomes possible after this]

  Name     : [project name]
  Concept  : [core concept]
  Lab      : [lab name]
  Course   : [course name]
  Phase    : 1
  Gap      : [what gap this closes]

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# "Generate the full curriculum list for this student.
#  For each project output exactly:
#  PROJECT [N]
#    Name     : [name]
#    Concept  : [concept]

#    Course   : [course]
#    Phase    : [phase]
#    Gap      : [specific gap in THIS student it closes]
#    Builds on: [what must be known first]
